# rebuild_evaluation_cache.py

<!-- Generated by scripts/docs/generate_api_docs.py. Do not edit manually. -->

## Purpose

Sweep legal strategy specs and refresh evaluation cache using unified evaluator dispatcher.

## CLI usage

```bash
python scripts/validate/rebuild_evaluation_cache.py --mode analytical
```

## CLI options

| Option | Type | Default | Required | Choices | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| --box-limit | int | None | False |  |  |
| --cache-dir | Path | Path('work') / 'fixture_bank' / 'evaluations' | False |  |  |
| --confidence | float | 0.95 | False |  |  |
| --families | str | majority pyramid horizontal vertical | False |  |  |
| --force-recompute | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --json-output | Path | None | False |  |  |
| --k-box-values | int | 1 3 7 | False |  |  |
| --max-strategies | int | None | False |  |  |
| --min-trust-level | int | None | False |  |  |
| --mode | str |  | True | analytical dense_exhaustive dense_mc procedural_mc |  |
| --n-eval-samples | int | 20000 | False |  |  |
| --n-train-samples | int | 10000 | False |  |  |
| --n2-values | int | 4 8 | False |  |  |
| --p-rules | float | 0.5 0.8 1.0 | False |  |  |
| --persist-analytical | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --quiet | flag | False | False |  |  |
| --seed | int | 123 | False |  |  |
| --subset-policy | str | up_to | False |  |  |
